summary: Audit Trail Dashboard feature testing complete. All backend APIs (17/17 tests pass) and frontend UI components are working correctly. The Audit Trail tab is visible as the 8th tab in Admin Settings Portal with all expected functionality.

console_warnings.issue: React hydration warnings about <span> being child of <select>/<option> - cosmetic, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/admin/audit-trail/stats - Returns total_changes, by_type, by_admin, daily_activity
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/audit-trail/stats with date filter - Works correctly
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/audit-trail/admins - Returns list of admins who made changes
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/audit-trail - Returns paginated logs with skip/limit
BACKEND: Pagination works correctly with skip and limit params
BACKEND: Filter by audit_type=settings works
BACKEND: Filter by settings_type=platform_settings works
BACKEND: Filter by changed_by (admin ID) works
BACKEND: Filter by date range (start_date, end_date) works
BACKEND: Combined filters work together
BACKEND: Log entries have enriched data (changed_by_name, employer_name, employee_name)
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/audit-trail/migrate works
BACKEND: Unauthorized access is blocked (403/401)
BACKEND: Invalid token is rejected (401)
BACKEND: Platform settings changes are logged to audit_trail
BACKEND: Stats total matches logs total
FRONTEND: Audit Trail tab appears as 8th tab in Admin Settings Portal
FRONTEND: Stats section shows 4 metrics (Total Changes, Employer Changes, Employee Changes, Active Admins)
FRONTEND: Filters section with 5 filter options (Change Type, Settings Type, Changed By, Start Date, End Date)
FRONTEND: Export CSV button is visible and enabled
FRONTEND: Clear All filters button works
FRONTEND: Activity by Admin section displays correctly
FRONTEND: Click-to-filter from Activity by Admin works (arrow button sets Changed By filter)
FRONTEND: Audit Log table shows paginated entries with correct format
FRONTEND: Log entries show type badges, admin name, timestamp
critical_code_review_comments: Minor React hydration warning about span being child of select - this is a common React development warning that doesn't affect functionality
seed_data_creation: Audit trail has 11 existing entries from previous settings changes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audit Trail Dashboard is fully functional at /admin/settings (8th tab 'Audit Trail'). Stats API returns total_changes=11, by_type breakdown, by_admin array with admin names, daily_activity. Logs API supports pagination (skip/limit) and filters (audit_type, settings_type, changed_by, start_date, end_date). All settings changes are automatically logged to audit_trail collection via embedded logging in update endpoints.

admins_api.returns: list of admins with id, name, email
